Uses of Package
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp

Packages that use org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
OpenID Connect Relying Party (RP) login support for Juneau REST servers.
  • Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp used by org.apache.juneau.rest.server.auth.oidc.rp
    Class
    Description
    EphemeralStore.PendingLogin
    A pending-login association awaiting the IdP callback.
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter
    Wraps Nimbus's IDTokenValidator to validate an OpenID Connect ID token's signature and claims and project the verified claims onto a Juneau ClaimsPrincipal.
    IdTokenValidatorAdapter.Builder
    Builder.
    InMemorySessionStore
    In-memory SessionStore backed by a bounded-LRU map, indexed by sub and sid so it can satisfy back-channel logout.
    OidcRelyingParty
    Facade orchestrating an OpenID Connect Authorization-Code-with-PKCE Relying Party login flow on top of the juneau-rest-server-auth-oauth building blocks.
    OidcRelyingParty.Builder
    Builder.
    OidcSession
    Immutable record describing a logged-in OpenID Connect Relying Party session.
    OidcSessionAuthFilter
    AuthFilter that resolves the OIDC Relying Party session cookie into a ClaimsPrincipal on each request, so RoleBasedRestGuard and @Auth Principal injection see the filter-resolved identity (via AuthenticatedRequestWrapper) with zero downstream changes.
    SessionStore
    SPI for persisting OidcSession instances and resolving them back from a session-cookie value.
    SignedCookieSessionStore
    Stateless SessionStore that serializes the session into an HMAC-signed compact JWT carried entirely in the session cookie.
    SignedCookieSessionStore.Builder
    Builder.
